title: Binance Trade
description: Represents a completed trade execution on the Binance exchange.

orderId.description: Order ID that generated this trade.

orderListId.description: Order list ID if part of an OCO. -1 otherwise.

commission.description: Commission amount charged for this trade.

time.description: Trade execution time in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

isBuyer.description: Whether the account was the buyer in this trade.

isMaker.description: Whether the account was the maker (liquidity provider) in this trade.

isBestMatch.description: Whether this trade was the best price match.

isBuyerMaker.description: Whether the buyer was the maker.
